messages.content: # Are your building textures on 110 glitched or broken? Follow this guide!

## Prerequisite
> Please ensure you are using **0.2.11 CSP**. (CM > Settings > Custom Shaders Patch > About & Updates)

# Method 1:

> Ensure you have "Optimize meshes some more" **DISABLED**.
> `Content Manager > Settings > Custom Shaders Patch > General Patch Settings > GPU Optimizations`

# Method 2:
> 7zip is required for this: 
> **[Download and install 7zip.](https://www.7-zip.org/)** **7zip** is free.

## Step 1: Delete the track:
> 1. <#1322235675239645184> > content > tracks
> 2. Delete the 110 folder

## Step 2: Reinstall the track manually. Ensure you install the `autoupateapp` lua.
> 1. [**Click Here**](<https://cdn.nohesi.gg/maps/nohesi_110.7z>) to download the track
> 2. Right-Click the zip folder > Show more options > 7zip > Open archive
> 3. Drag & Drop the `apps` and `content` into <#1322235675239645184>
> -# This "apps" folder, contains the "autoupateapp" lua needed
